local_worktree_agent_branches.preservation_warning: The 18 worktree-agent-* tips are NOT reachable from `main`. `git subtree add ... main` in M1 imports only the main-reachable history. Preservation of these branches requires explicit archive tags created and pushed to origin BEFORE the branches are deleted in M0 cleanup. See docs/merge/M0/worktree-inventory.md for the tag-first cleanup commands.

notes: The donor repo is 3 days old (created 2026-05-18) and has not accumulated community artefacts (0 issues, 0 PRs, 0 releases, 0 tags, 0 milestones, no custom labels, no wiki content, no discussions, no branch protection rules).
Pages are enabled but have never deployed (status=null, 0 builds).
8 GitHub Actions workflows are active; their definitions live in the repo at .github/workflows/* and will be preserved by the source merge.
All commits reachable from main are preserved by the git history merge in M1. The 18 worktree-agent-* branch tips are NOT reachable from main — see preservation_warning above.

The single push to the remote-only branch worktree-agent-a62b667d41c6c951a is phase-10 (resampling preprocessors); content is semantically integrated by later aggregate commits on main — see docs/merge/M0/worktree-inventory.md for the integration evidence.

local_state.stale_worktree_state: All 18 worktrees are LOCKED — `git worktree prune` skips locked worktrees and would not clean them. Cleanup must first `git worktree unlock <path>` then `git worktree remove --force <path>` or `git worktree prune` after the metadata files are removed.
